LEAD-CAPTURE EMAIL FIXED (2026-06-09): root cause was unverified Resend sending domain steelboxdirect.com -> all sends 403'd silently while DB still saved (form looked successful). Owner verified the domain in Resend; live form test delivered both emails. Leads were never lost (all in Supabase). SELLER alert inbox = carder.creative@gmail.com. Added submit-quote.ts safeguard: loud error on send failure + sellerNotified/buyerConfirmed in response + PII removed from logs (34ac04e).
